features.name: age
features.description: Age of the patient (clinical risk factor)

features.name: city
features.description: Geographic city location of the patient

features.name: chronic_flag
features.description: Indicator if patient has chronic condition

features.name: days_since_registration
features.description: Days between registration and encounter date

features.name: visit_month
features.description: Month of the visit (seasonal operational patterns)

features.name: visit_day_of_week
features.description: Day of week of the visit (weekday workload patterns)

features.name: visit_frequency
features.description: Total visits by patient (historical volume risk)

features.name: avg_length_of_stay_patient
features.description: Average length of stay for the patient (clinical complexity)

features.name: provider_rejection_rate
features.description: Leakage-controlled historical rejection rate of insurance provider

targets.name: risk_score
targets.description: Clinical and operational risk score (Low, Medium, High)
